description: Revert or isolate `.env.localtest` credential changes before committing remediation work.
Revert or justify `package-lock.json` package version regressions before committing remediation work.
Remove or deliberately commit only relevant review artifacts; do not accidentally commit transient `progress.md`.
Record the current reviewed commit range and blockers in the remediation scratchpad.
Establish a clean git status baseline for remediation commits excluding unrelated local changes.
Move product_code NextAuth type augmentation to the shared auth package type declaration.
Remove conflicting product_code declaration from server-only NextAuth augmentation or make it exactly match the shared declaration.
Add product_code to JWT type augmentation consistently.
Add product_code to Session.user type augmentation consistently.
Add product_code to ExtendedUser or local auth runtime user shape where token/session mapping requires it.
Select product_code from tenants in tenant subscription/product info lookup.
Return product_code from fetchTenantSubscriptionInfo or equivalent auth helper.
Set token.product_code on initial sign-in for tenant users.
Refresh token.product_code on periodic tenant info refresh.
Map token.product_code into session.user.product_code in session callback.
Preserve existing plan mapping in auth callbacks.
Preserve existing addons mapping in auth callbacks.
Preserve existing trial fields in auth callbacks.
Make ProductProvider resolve Algadesk from session without unsafe casts where possible.
Define safe fallback behavior for sessions without product_code during rollout.
Add unit coverage proving an Algadesk session resolves `useProduct().isAlgadesk` true.
Add regression coverage proving a PSA session resolves `useProduct().isPsa` true.
Run server typecheck after auth/session fixes.
Add statusCode=403 to ProductAccessError.
Keep PRODUCT_ACCESS_DENIED code stable on all product-denied errors.
Update API error handling to map product-denied errors with status or statusCode to HTTP 403.
Update standalone route handlers to return product-denied 403 instead of generic 500.
Add a helper for converting ProductAccessError to NextResponse where route handlers do not use API middleware.
Add tests for product-denied API middleware response shape.
Allow `/client-portal/client-settings` for Algadesk in portal route rules.
Keep `/client-portal/settings` behavior only if the route exists or is intentionally supported.
Treat `/msp/settings/notifications` as denied or upgrade-boundary for Algadesk unless explicitly narrowed.
Treat `/msp/settings/extensions` as denied or upgrade-boundary for Algadesk.
Treat broad `/msp/settings/integrations` and integration callback paths as denied for Algadesk except focused email-channel paths.
Keep `/msp/settings?tab=email` allowed only for focused Email Channels configuration.
Keep `/msp/settings?tab=knowledge-base` allowed for focused KB configuration.
Correct Algadesk API KB allowlist to `/api/v1/kb-articles`.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/financial`.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/quotes`.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/contracts` and contract-line route variants.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/services`, `/api/v1/service-types`, and `/api/v1/products`.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/accounting-exports` and accounting integration API families.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/platform-*`, `/api/v1/admin`, and tenant-management APIs.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/feature-flags` and platform feature flag APIs unless admin-only PSA behavior requires otherwise.
Add deny rules for `/api/v1/documents` while preserving ticket attachment and KB-safe routes.
Add deny rules for automation/workflow API families.
Add deny rules for AI/chat API families including non-v1 chat routes.
Add deny rules for assets/RMM route families.
Add deny rules for scheduling/time route families.
Add deny rules for surveys route families.
Add deny rules for extensions route families.
Add representative registry tests for exact allowed Algadesk routes.
Add representative registry tests for exact denied Algadesk routes.
Add representative registry tests for unknown Algadesk route/API fail-closed behavior.
Add representative registry tests proving PSA remains allowed for PSA route/API groups.
Replace raw Algadesk children rendering in MspLayoutClient with a real Algadesk shell component.
Render an Algadesk sidebar in the Algadesk MSP shell.
Render a header/app chrome in the Algadesk MSP shell.
Render a main content container matching normal page layout expectations.
Avoid ActivityDrawerProvider in Algadesk shell unless explicitly needed for help desk.
Avoid SchedulingProviderWithCallbacks in Algadesk shell.
Avoid project integration providers in Algadesk shell.
Avoid asset/document full-management providers in Algadesk shell except ticket/KB-safe providers.
Avoid AIChatContextProvider in Algadesk shell unless AI is explicitly excluded from UI and provider has no user-facing effect.
Keep TagProvider and required i18n/session/tier/product providers in Algadesk shell.
Fix SidebarWithFeatureFlags generic return types so filtered sections typecheck as NavigationSection arrays.
Ensure product-filtered settings sections typecheck without unsafe broad casts.
Keep PSA MspLayoutClient path using DefaultLayout unchanged for PSA tenants.
Add a shell test that Algadesk renders sidebar/header, not only raw children.
Create a server-side helper to resolve current tenant product and route behavior for an explicit pathname.
Create a server-side helper to return upgrade boundary/notFound before page data fetching.
Apply server-side guard to `/msp/billing` before billing data loads.
Apply server-side guard to `/msp/projects` and project child routes before project data loads.
Apply server-side guard to `/msp/assets` and asset child routes before asset data loads.
Apply server-side guard to scheduling and dispatch pages before schedule data loads.
Apply server-side guard to time entry and approvals pages before time data loads.
Apply server-side guard to workflow pages before workflow data loads.
Apply server-side guard to surveys pages before survey data loads.
Apply server-side guard to extensions pages before extension data loads.
Apply server-side guard to reports and service request pages before excluded data loads.
Apply server-side guard to excluded client portal billing/project/device/document/appointment/service-request/extension pages.
Keep client-side ProductRouteBoundary as secondary UI fallback only.
Add tests proving excluded page loaders do not call their data actions for Algadesk.
Add tests proving representative PSA excluded routes still render for PSA tenants.
Centralize product API enforcement in authenticate/context creation or another unavoidable API controller path.
Remove reliance on individual base CRUD methods for product API enforcement.
Audit overridden controller methods for product enforcement coverage.
Ensure ApiProjectController overridden list/get/task methods cannot bypass product API gate.
Ensure financial controller methods cannot bypass product API gate.
Ensure invoice controller methods cannot bypass product API gate.
Ensure quote controller methods cannot bypass product API gate.
Ensure asset/RMM controller methods cannot bypass product API gate.
Ensure custom tag/client/contact methods preserve allowed Algadesk behavior while still passing product gate.
Add product guards to standalone chat API routes.
Add product guards to standalone email routes while preserving allowed email-to-ticket paths.
Add product guards to standalone extension and integration API routes.
Return structured 403 PRODUCT_ACCESS_DENIED for denied Algadesk API requests.
Keep allowed Algadesk ticket/client/contact/KB/email APIs functional.
Keep PSA API behavior unchanged for PSA tenants.
Filter API endpoint metadata by product for Algadesk.
Filter OpenAPI paths by product for Algadesk.
Filter API docs output by product for Algadesk.
Filter generated permission metadata by product for Algadesk.
Filter metadata stats/counts so Algadesk counts only visible endpoints/schemas/permissions.
Filter schemas/models that are exclusively PSA-only from Algadesk metadata where feasible.
Document any shared schemas intentionally still visible to Algadesk.
Preserve complete PSA metadata/OpenAPI output for PSA tenants.
Integrate relevant contact-detail Algadesk mode changes from the current uncommitted working tree.
Prevent Algadesk `/msp/contacts/[id]?tab=documents` from fetching contact documents.
Prevent Algadesk ContactDetails from rendering the Documents tab.
Preserve PSA contact document fetching on `tab=documents`.
Preserve PSA ContactDetails Documents tab rendering.
Add product composition tests for Algadesk and PSA contact detail behavior.
Fix T015 Playwright helper signatures to match actual helper APIs.
Fix T015 route assumptions for portal ticket creation so it targets a real creation flow.
Add cleanup for tenants and related data created by Algadesk Playwright tests.
Fix package-level ticket detail test runner failure or move test to a runnable server Vitest context.
Audit source-string contract tests and rename any that remain as contract/static tests.
Replace T016/T017 inbound email source-string coverage with DB-backed behavior coverage or mark as external-prerequisite tests.
Replace T019 API source-string coverage with real API-key request coverage for allowed and denied routes.
Replace T020 metadata source-string coverage with real metadata/OpenAPI endpoint coverage.
Ensure DB-backed tests have clear prerequisites and skip/fail behavior appropriate for CI.
Run focused unit tests for product resolver, registry, product context, shell, settings, contact detail, and error handling.
Run focused integration tests for product_code migration and representative API gates when DB is available.
Run Playwright list and at least one smoke execution path when browser environment is available.
Add a note to the parent scratchpad that this remediation plan supersedes implementation tracking until blockers are resolved.
Reset or correct parent tests.json implemented booleans for tests proven non-runnable or source-only if the team chooses to keep parent status authoritative.
Reset or correct parent features.json implemented booleans for features contradicted by remediation blockers if the team chooses to keep parent status authoritative.
Keep this remediation features.json entirely false until fixes are verified.
Keep this remediation tests.json entirely false until tests are verified.
